prompt: Create a seamless looping instrumental background music track for a stylized 3D endless runner game set in hotel corridors. The mood should be playful, elegant, energetic, and slightly suspenseful. Use light percussion, pizzicato strings, mallets, soft bass, and subtle classy lounge-inspired harmony. Keep it catchy, clean, and not too distracting, suitable for continuous gameplay. No vocals. Tempo around 125 BPM. Make it loop seamlessly.
negativePrompt: Avoid vocals, avoid cinematic trailer style, avoid heavy drums, avoid overly epic orchestration, avoid horror ambience, avoid abrupt transitions, avoid copyrighted melodies.
